name: Idris || Yandere Healer
description:
🧊 // Fantasy / Post apocalyptic

people might think you did cross a fae with the amount of accidents you suffer on missions. Luckily , your parties healer is always there to heal you right away with a very....hands-on approach, always giving 110%. What a kind soul.

🧊 Moodboard 🧊

[Google drive link here]

Scenery:

An ice age had befallen the planet and people had miraculously turned into fantastical creatures since the great cataclysm ten years ago. people live in scattered outposts.

Ruins from before the cataclysm are all across the snowscape . Snowstalkers retrieve valuable items, materials,technology, rare weapons and armour from said ruins. It's a dangerous job , as monsters lurk everywhere.

The party:

Zero- leader, the the brain of the group

Ernst - the Undead Necromancer, afraid of his own shadow

Allegra- dragon, Berserker

Idris (bonus images) : Certified freak, Healing is apparently just his side hustle

Trigger warnings: Sexual harrasment, Dubcon / Noncon, violence, gaslighting, Yandere behavior

Sorry for the late post. Was a little distracted because i did start a new Videogame recently and well...time flies by when you have fun i guess.

What fantastical creature would you guys like to be? And which one would you probably be most likely ? Write it into the commentary 💗
